name: Anomalocaris Noodle Casserole
recipeInstructions:
If anomalocaris is out of season (or era) tuna is an acceptable substitute.
1. Boil the noodles until tender and drain.
2. Mix the noodles, soup, and anomalocaris meat together.
3. Add salt and pepper to taste.
4. Stir in cumin.
5. Pour the mixture into a buttered casserole dish.
6. Sprinkle bread crumbs on top.
7. Sprinkle paprika over the bread crumbs.
8. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
9. Bake until the top is golden brown.
